title: solanum nigrum var. douglasii
intro: Solanum nigrum var. douglasii, also known as black nightshade or Douglas' black nightshade, is a plant species that belongs to the Solanaceae family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiviral, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum var. douglasii include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
